title: SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER AND PROJECT-BASED PROGRAMS - 211info
text: KLAMATH HOUSING AUTHORITY SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER AND PROJECT-BASED PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Housing Choice Voucher program (Section 8 Tenant-Based Rental Assistance) provides direct rental subsidy payments on behalf of eligible families and individuals to private landlords. The Section 8 Project-Based Rental Assistance program provides rental assistance on behalf of eligible families or individuals. Project-based assistance is tied to specific multifamily developments. All subsidies remain with the approved development, therefore, once a project-based subsidy tenant moves from the development, the subsidy stays with the development and the tenant no longer receives assistance. Fields complaints about Section 8. 1445 Avalon Street Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: -Must be a US citizen or have an eligible immigration status -Household income must not exceed 50% of the Area Median Income (AMI) Hours: Monday/Thursday 9am-5pm Email (541) 884-0649 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 884-0649 Toll-free (866) 358-8549 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Preliminary applications for the waitlist available online. FEES: Housing Choice Vouchers: Tenants are required to pay a minimum of 30% of their income for rent; based on the unit chosen, the tenant may pay up to 40% of their income for rent Project-Based Assistance: Tenants are required to pay a minimum of 30% of their income for rent DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, Social Security cards, names, and birth certificates for all household members LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Services: Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - RURAL DEVELOPMENT AND TAX CREDIT PROPERTIES MONEY MANAGEMENT - HOMEPATH PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH HOUSING AUTHORITY
